title: Human Resource Trainee
company: Western India Electromedical Systems Pvt Ltd
description:
Company Description

Western India Electromedical Systems Pvt Ltd is a healthcare HVAC company specializing in the design and installation of Modular Operation Theatres, Modular ICU/PICU/NICU, and IVF labs. Established in 1997, the company has been at the forefront of creating infection-free zones and highly sterile environments for critical healthcare facilities.




Role Description

We are seeking a full-time Human Resource Trainee to join our team at our office located in Chinchwad, Pune District. The role will involve supporting daily HR operations, learning about HR policies, assisting in personnel management, managing employee benefits, and contributing to the development and implementation of HR initiatives. The trainee will gain hands-on experience in all facets of HR management in an on-site setting.




Qualifications

Knowledge of Human Resources (HR) and HR Management practices
Understanding of HR Policies and Employee Benefits administration
Basic skills in Personnel Management
Strong organizational and time management skills
Excellent verbal and written communication abilities
Proficiency with office software (e.g., Word, Excel, and PowerPoint)
Relevant educational background in HR or Business Administration
Eagerness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment




Send your resume with cover letter :

Mail Id - hr@wiespl.com

Contact No. - 9881151272

title: Microelectronics Structural and Thermal Integrity Internship
description:
Job Title: Microelectronics Structural and Thermal Integrity Internship

Introduction:

Drive technology innovations that shape the way we live and connect. Our technology drives the Era of Pervasive Intelligence, where smart tech and AI are seamlessly woven into daily life. From self-driving cars and health-monitoring smartwatches to renewable energy systems that efficiently distribute clean power, Synopsys creates high-performance silicon chips that help build a healthier, safer, and more sustainable world.

Internship Experience:

At Synopsys, interns dive into real-world projects, gaining hands-on experience while collaborating with our passionate teams worldwide—and having fun in the process! You'll have the freedom to share your ideas, unleash your creativity, and explore your interests. This is your opportunity to bring your solutions to life and work with cutting-edge technology that shapes not only the future of innovation but also your own career path. Join us and start shaping your future today!

Mission Statement:

Our mission is to fuel today’s innovations and spark tomorrow’s creativity. Together, we embrace a growth mindset, empower one another, and collaborate to achieve our shared goals. Every day, we live by our values of Integrity, Excellence, Leadership, and Passion, fostering an inclusive culture where everyone can thrive—both at work and beyond.

What You’ll Be Doing:


Contributing to the development and optimization of high-performance ICs/3DICs/HBMs, microelectronic systems
Work on new simulation methodologies, troubleshoot and benchmarks, and update industry best practices
Create technical content around the area of semiconductor, manufacturing and structural integrity
Perform a literature search to locate relevant publications using Synopsys S&A solutions or competitive products, as well as experimental data
Explore AI/ML techniques applicable to this field to improve fidelity, turnaround time, etc.


What You’ll Need:


Currently pursuing or recently completed a Master’s or PhD in Mechanical Engineering, Materials, or a related field
Strong fundamentals in solid mechanics and materials behavior
Basic experience with finite element analysis and numerical modeling
Experience with Ansys Mechanical, LS Dyna, or similar simulation tools (preferred)
Proficiency in Python and strong technical writing skills, basic familiarity with AI/ML techniques (preferred)
Passion for technology, eagerness to learn, and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment


Key Program Facts:


Program Length: 3 months
Location: Pune (India)
Working Model: 100% onsite
Full-Time/Part-Time: Full-Time
Start Date: May-July 2026


Equal Opportunity Statement:

Synopsys is committed to creating an inclusive workplace and is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome all qualified applicants to apply, regardless of age, color, family or medical leave, gender identity or expression, marital status, disability, race and ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by local laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation during the application process, please reach out to us.

title: EIC Apprentice
description:
Job Title

EIC Apprentice

Job Description Summary

Apprenticeship is a Govt Initiated Program that entails your growth by gaining exposure on Real- Live-Projects.

Job Description

Apprenticeship Program: Project Development Service

Responsibilities


Assist in design, drawings, and development: Assist senior engineers in reviewing designing basis report, drawings, developing, and implementing in projects.
Conduct site inspections: Conduct site inspections to monitor progress in daily basis and ensure compliance with safety regulations.
Prepare reports and documents: Prepare daily progress reports, documents, and presentations to communicate project progress.
Collaborate with teams: Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including architects, contractors, and other stakeholders.
Develop project management skills: Develop project management skills, including scheduling, budgeting, and resource allocation.
Stay updated with industry trends: Stay updated with industry trends, best practices, and new technologies and machineries.
Assist in testing and commissioning: Assist in testing and commissioning of civil, electrical & mechanical engineering systems.
Participate in training and development programs: Participate in training and development programs to enhance skills and knowledge.
Maintain a safe and healthy work environment: Maintain a safe and healthy work environment, adhering to company safety policies and procedures.
Assist in quality control: Assist in ensuring that civil, electrical & mechanical engineering projects meet quality, safety, and environmental standards.


Qualifications Graduation


Bachelor's degree (B.Tech Civil degree or Engineering)


What are we looking for?


Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Strong data analytical and mathematical skills.
MS Office expertise
Hardworking and determined


INCO: “Cushman & Wakefield”

title: Intern-Industrial Engineering (Acoustic)_Plant
description:
As a successful family-owned company on a path to global growth, the Brose Group offers challenging responsibilities and exciting career opportunities to performance-driven, skilled specialists with solid professional knowledge and proven career expertise who wish to contribute to our company’s success.

Your Tasks


Single point of contact for the acoustic evaluation. Identify the opportunities on production line to optimise the wase. Evaluate the requirments of mahcine and transfer into specification of requirments.
This Plant acoustic engineer becomes the first point of contact in case of: Acoustic problems on EOL; setting up of EOL acoustic parameters; basic acoustic evaluations; support of QU claim reports, etc; Preparation of all necessary documents and instuctions for manufacturing equipments like PFD,PFMEA,WI,Check sheets.
Support to customer team industrial Engineering for Industrial Engineering tasks incuding the planning and procurement of manufacturing equipment on time.
Active involvement in assembly line trails,procss validation activities for new projects.
Responsible for process capabilty studies,POKA YOKE on assembly lines.
Responsible for the customer/IATF and internal audits for IE function.
Responsible for daily assembly line and equipment process problem solvings as CFT member.


Your Profile


BE/BTech Electronics/Electrical or Equivalent Qualification.
Experience: 0-1 year.
Knowledge in work studies.
Knowledge in Electronics manufacturing.


We offer you a modern working environment with our Brose working world

Brose offers a high-tech work environment and a wide range of benefits. Along with competitive performance-based compensation and health insurance, our employees also benefit from attractive social and family-oriented programs throughout our North American locations*. Our benefits packages include comprehensive medical and insurance. Brose also provides educational assistance and a variety of community outreach, family, and sporting events. Flexible working hours and a collaborative work environment give our employees the freedom to balance work and personal life. Brose believes in investing in people. We offer a wide range of development programs with great opportunity for individual growth through training, international or regional assignments and tailored career paths. Our objective is to provide our employees the tools necessary to live a balanced life, experience a rewarding work environment and contribute to our surrounding communities.


Benefits package may vary slightly per location

title: TOOLBOX -BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN
description:
Toolbox - BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN

Toolbox Studio is a media organization in India, specialized in Visual Effects & Animation, TV Commercials, Motion Graphics and Corporate Video Production. We are designed to provide solutions to a range of industries that include Film, Broadcast, Online, Digital and spectrum of corporate sectors such as IT, Education, Hospitality, Automobile and Lifestyle. Along with having international experience across 3 continents, Toolbox is firmly rooted with its extensive home experience that places us uniquely to deliver international as well as domestic projects with equal professionalism. www.toolbox-studio.com

Job Title / Designation: BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN

We are looking for a detail-oriented Business Development Intern with a strong focus on CRM management and process support. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with data, maintaining structured workflows, and supporting business growth initiatives through organized systems. This will be a 3-month internship which can be converted to full time employment based on performance.

Key Responsibilities


Maintain and update CRM with accurate client, studio, and project information
Track incoming inquiries and potential opportunities within the VFX pipeline
Research production houses, studios, and OTT platforms for potential collaboration
Organize and segment client data based on geography, project type, and service requirements (Roto, Paint, Comp, etc.)
Monitor communication history, follow-ups, and engagement timelines in the CRM
Assist in preparing pitch decks, company profiles, and bid documentation
Support coordination between business development and production team
Identify gaps in data/processes and suggest improvements for better workflow efficiency

Requirements


Strong attention to detail and data organization skills
Basic understanding of the VFX pipeline (Roto, Paint, Compositing, etc.) is a plus
Familiarity with CRM systems and structured workflows
Good communication and coordination skills
Proficiency in Excel / Google Sheets

Work Experience Required

0-1 Years of Experience (of handling international clients), Freshers can apply.

Education: Recently completed a degree

Location: Baner, Balewadi High Street,Pune

Languages

English, Hindi (bilingual / fluent proficiency), Marathi (Working knowledge proficiency)

Any Other Skill Set


Interest in the VFX, film, or OTT industry
Experience with research on production companies
Basic understanding of bidding and project coordination in VFX

title: Sales Intern
description:
Business Unit: MAES

Division: SAS Commercial

Challenge Yourself and Impact the Future!

MacDermid Alpha Electronics Solutions, a business of Element Solutions Inc (NYSE: ESI), is renowned worldwide for its commitment to revolutionizing the electronics industry. With a legacy spanning over a century, we have continually set new benchmarks for excellence, reliability and sustainability in electronic materials.

Our Expertise:

Wafer Level Solutions - Revolutionizing wafer fabrication processes for enhanced efficiency and performance

Semiconductor Assembly Solutions - Driving innovation in semiconductor assembly processes for unparallelled reliability

Circuitry Solutions - Tailored solutions to meet the dynamic demands of modern circuitry

Circuit Board Assembly Solutions - Elevating circuit board assembly processes for optimal performance

Film & Smart Surface Solutions - Transforming electronics with cutting-edge materials and technologies for enhanced functionality and reliability

Across diverse sectors including automotive, consumer electronics, mobile devices, telecom, data storage, and infrastructure, MacDermid Alpha Electronics Solutions has earned the trust of manufacturers worldwide. Our comprehensive range of high quality solutions and technical services covers the entire electronics supply chain, empowering businesses to thrive in today's competitive landscape.

We strive to embody the five 'Elements of our Culture'- our '5C's'; Challenge, Commit, Collaborate, Choose, and Care. These core values are the foundation of our organization which our employees embrace in their interactions with customers, colleagues and other stakeholders, to drive financial performance and create a rewarding work environment.

Who are we looking for?

We are looking for a motivated intern to support Electrolube India’s technical and sales activities in the Southern/Northern/Western Region. This role is ideal for candidates who are interested in electronics manufacturing materials, conformal coatings, thermal management solutions, and customer-facing technical work.

The intern will assist the sales and CTS team in data management, customer support, product demonstrations, and sample coordination.

What will you be doing?



Technical Support
Assist in preparing product demos, sample preparation, and basic application trials for customers.
Support CTS engineers in collecting customer technical data, coating specifications, and process parameters.
Help document trial reports, test results, and coating application feedback.
Sales Support
Maintain and update customer databases, visit trackers, and sales pipelines.
Assist in creating presentations, product comparison sheets, and technical notes.
Support in follow-ups for sample approvals, PO tracking, and customer queries.
Coordination & Operations
Coordinate with warehouse/logistics for sample dispatch, inventory checks, and material movement.
Work with internal teams (R&D, Quality, Customer Service) for documentation and approvals.
Support in preparing monthly reports, MIS, and market intelligence updates.



Who are You?



Pursuing or completed B.E / Diploma / BSc (Electronics, Electrical, Chemical, Polymer, Mechanical, Materials Science preferred).
Strong interest in electronics manufacturing, coatings, adhesives, or materials technology.
Good proficiency in MS Excel, PowerPoint, and documentation.
Ability to communicate clearly with customers and internal teams.
Willingness to travel occasionally within the region for customer visits.



What competencies will you need?



Curious and eager to learn technical concepts.
Self-driven, organised, and proactive.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced, customer-facing environment.
Good attitude and professional behaviour during customer interactions.



We are Offering...

Equal Opportunity Employer

All qualified applications will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, pregnancy, genetic information, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other protected category applicable under federal, state and local laws.

title: Trainee, Project Management
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Trainee, Project Management to join our team. As a Project Management Trainee, you will assist in planning, executing, and closing projects under the guidance of senior project managers. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing real-world projects across various domains.

Key Responsibilities:


Organizing Kick off meeting for all assigned new order with Internal stake Holders for smooth order transfer.
Preparation and control of schedules/project plans for all orders.
Conduct regular planning & review meetings to ensure project timelines.
Single window for all communication with Customer in regard to approvals, project schedules and delivery plans.
Organizing Inspections as required under QAP.
Coordination with site team for schedules and ensuring project timelines.
Project milestone update to customer.
Coordination with design team for the detail engineering.
Cost management/Budget control with the help of senior manager.
SAP Knowledge would be an extra advantage.
Coordination with commercial team on AR (account receivables).
Coordination with site team for project closure.
Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with internal processes
Awareness of ISO 14001 & 45001 Standards


Qualifications

Diploma (DET) – Electrical/Mechanical.

Experience: Fresher or 0-1year experience.

Competencies and skills, we expect for this role:


Excellent written and verbal communication
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tools like SAP & MS Project is a plus.
Ability to work with team to achieve goals.
Target Driven
Eagerness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment


Additional Information

What we offer you:

In return, we can offer you exciting and challenging Specialist – Project Management and flexible working environment to form a part of the Konecranes & Demag Industrial Cranes India team, you will create value added support locally and in delivering services as per our Lifting People Strategy.

Please apply through www.konecranes.com/career

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.

title: Project Management- Trainee
description:
Excited to start your career in a technical PMO environment? If you enjoy working with data, collaborating with teams, and driving project success, we encourage you to apply and grow with us!




Job Title: PMO Executive / Management Trainee (Technical PMO)

Location: Bangalore

Work Mode: Work From Office

Experience Required: freshers ( 0-1 year )

Notice Period: Immediate Joiners




About the Role

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented professional to join our team as a PMO Executive. This role is ideal for candidates with a strong management background and a keen interest in Project Management Office (PMO) functions, data handling, and reporting.




Key Responsibilities

Assist in PMO activities including planning, tracking, and reporting of projects
Handle and manage data, ensuring accuracy and consistency
Create and maintain reports, dashboards, and documentation
Coordinate with internal teams to track project progress
Support project governance and process improvements
Communicate effectively with stakeholders and team members
Contribute to overall project efficiency and timely delivery

Mandatory Requirements

MBA graduate (mandatory)
Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel
Experience in data handling, reporting, or management-related tasks
Strong communication skills (verbal and written)
Interest and enthusiasm for working in a Technical PMO environment

Preferred / Value-Added Skills

Ability to guide and inspire teams
Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills
Experience in client interaction or stakeholder management
Basic understanding of project management concepts and tools

Key Competencies

Attention to detail
Organizational and multitasking abilities
Proactive and self-driven attitude
Team collaboration and coordination skills

Why Join Us?

Opportunity to work in a structured PMO environment
Exposure to real-time project management practices
Career growth in project management and operations
Collaborative and dynamic team culture

title: Graduate Apprentice Trainee
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.

We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

Who We Are And What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join Volvo Group. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

Trucks Technology & Industrial Division hire team players who are ready to create real customer impact. Our decentralized teams work close to our customers, with speed and autonomy, to build what they truly need.

Join us to collaborate on innovative, sustainable technologies that redefine how we design, build, and deliver value. Bring your curiosity, your expertise, and your collaborative energy, and together, we’ll turn bold ideas into tangible solutions for our customers and contribute to a more sustainable tomorrow.

About Volvo Group

At Volvo Group, we are driving prosperity through transport and infrastructure solutions, shaping the future of sustainable mobility. As part of our commitment to nurturing young talent, we invite fresh engineering graduates to join us under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS). This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on industry experience and work alongside experts on real-world projects

Eligibility Criteria


Education: B.Tech / B.E. in Automobile Engineering or Mechanical Engineering
Year of Graduation: 2023, 2024, or 2025
Program: National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) .


Key Skills & Knowledge Areas


Strong fundamentals in Automobile / Mechanical Engineering concepts
Knowledge of CAE tools such as ANSA, ALTAIR HYPERWORKS, NASTRAN (added advantage)
Proficiency in MS Office tools (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Good analytical and problem-solving skills
Effective communication and teamwork abilities


Roles & Responsibilities


Support simulation activities within the assigned engineering team
Assist in preparing and updating CAE models, analysis & report preparation.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on product and process improvement initiatives
Learn and apply Volvo’s engineering standards and procedures
Participate in technical reviews, data analysis, and report preparation
Support ongoing engineering and manufacturing operations as part of the learning process


Program Duration

As per NATS guidelines

title: Intern - Marketing, Brands and Communications
description:
Enabling Areas – Marketing, Brand, and Communications

Marketing, Brand, and Communications – Intern, Mumbai (3-6 months)

What impact will you make?

Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. As the undisputed leader in professional services, Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivalled opportunities to succeed and realise your full potential

Work you’ll do:

Within the Marketing, Brand, and Communications team, your work will be aligned with marketing and engagement initiatives. This entails ideation and execution of marketing campaigns for change and business initiatives across various communication channels.




Essentials:

Support digital marketing and campaign planning initiatives while contributing to storytelling and marketing communication efforts
Being proactive with fresh ideas and taking ownership to execute campaigns and marketing strategy
Staying updated with the latest innovations and trends in marketing and social media communications
Comfort with producing short format format-friendly and engaging content from end-to-end
Strong language skills, both verbal and written
Strong skills in PowerPoint, Canva and any other creative tools to be able to support on visualising and creating periodic progress reports for the team




Qualifications:

A graduate degree in marketing, mass media, or similar fields is an advantage, as are additional certifications in digital marketing-related programs. However, we are open to anyone with a creative bent of mind.
Should have completed bachelors at least.
Currently in Mumbai and will to travel to Thane




Experience:

Prior experience in digital marketing, branding, social media marketing or similar is mandatory.




Your role as a leader

At Deloitte India, we believe in the importance of leadership at all levels. We expect our people to embrace and live our purpose by challenging themselves to identify issues that are most important for our clients, our people, and for society and make an impact that matters.




In addition to living our purpose, Executive across our organization:

Builds own understanding of our purpose and values; explores opportunities for impact
Demonstrates strong commitment to personal learning and development; acts as a brand
ambassador to help attract top talent
Understands expectations and demonstrates personal accountability for keeping performance on track
Actively focuses on developing effective communication and relationship-building skills
Understands how their daily work contributes to the priorities of the team and the business




How you’ll grow

At Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help build world-class skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career.




Our purpose

Deloitte is led by a purpose: To make an impact that matters.

Every day, Deloitte people are making a real impact in the places they live and work. We pride ourselves on doing not only what is good for clients, but also what is good for our people and the communities in which we live and work—always striving to be an organization that is held up as a role model of quality, integrity, and positive change.




© 2025 Deloitte Shared Services India LLP

title: Graduate Engineer Trainee
description:
Position Title: - Graduate Engineer Trainee – Quote and Spec




ZURN Organization:

Headquartered in Milwaukee, Zurn Industries, LLC We manufacture the industry spectrum of advanced water solutions to save customers steps, cost of ownership, and labor. Zurn Industries, LLC supplies the industry’s widest range of advanced water system solutions that enhance and ensure quality, safety, flow control and conservation in and around nonresidential buildings. Zurn builds value and trust through superior knowledge of the global markets and customers we serve. We provide innovative water solutions delivered by exceptional people.




For more information visit, kindly visit: www.zurn.com




Position Summary - The mentioned resource will focus on building quotes, crossing products, and helping sales team w.r.t product engineering knowledge and insights.




Responsibilities

• Ability to read and understand product specification and plumbing plans.

• Ability to read and understand MEP plans and plumbing architectural plans.

• Provides spec writing services including crossing competitive spec and matching them to Zurn products.

• Understanding and able to interpret Plumbing drawings and layouts along with fixture schedule.

• Create digital specifications and collaborate with customers on projects using Zurn’s proprietary digital specification solution.

• Responsibilities also include providing equipment functionality and capability reports to the sales force, and acting as technical liaison to the sales team

• Collaborate closing with the spec sales team to create and delivery specifications for key accounts and large commercial building projects

• Coordinate additional support activities and post-sales technical support with engineering departments.

• Produce Presentations and product comparisons for sales assistance.

• Determine product technical strength/weaknesses vs. competition.

• Specialty knowledge of finished plumbing, fixture carriers, PEX, water safety & control and/or commercial drainage products.




Experience and Skill Required

• BE/B. Tech in Mechanical/Civil Engineering, 2025 pass outs are eligible to apply.

• Knowledge of inside-sales process and quoting/bidding

• Experience with Microsoft Office Suite, (Power Point, Excel, Word, Access)

• Teamwork, presentation, project management, and verbal/written communication skills required

• Ability to work independently and execute task in timely manner.

• Customer Driven Sense of Urgency

• Self-motivated individual able to multi-task effectively and work in a fast-paced environment




Location - Hyderabad, Meenakshi Teck park, Gachibowli.

title: UIUX & Product Design Intern
description:
UI/UX AND PRODUCT DESIGN INTERN

Experience: 0–1 years | Location: Mumbai (In-Office) | Duration: 4 months

About U.Labs

U.Labs is a venture studio and idea lab building brands, products, and growth ecosystems for the next economy. We work at the intersection of strategy, AI, technology, design, and commerce to create measurable business impact.

We partner with consumer brands, enterprises, and new-age companies to build sharp digital experiences, scalable products, and meaningful systems. Alongside our consulting and services business, we are also building our own portfolio of technology products across ecommerce, SaaS, AI, omnichannel retail, and enterprise tech.

We move fast, think deeply, and execute with precision. We care about ideas, systems, details, and experiences that truly work.

About The Role

We’re looking for a UI/UX and Product Design Intern to join the design team at U.Labs.

This role is for someone who wants hands-on exposure to designing real digital products and interfaces — someone who is excited by user journeys, product thinking, interface systems, interaction design, and turning ideas into intuitive experiences.

This is not a pure graphic design or social media design internship. This role is focused on product design, UI/UX thinking, and digital experience design across websites, platforms, SaaS products, ecommerce experiences, and internal product ecosystems.

You will work closely with designers, product thinkers, and cross-functional teams to support the creation of flows, wireframes, UI systems, prototypes, and polished digital interfaces. This is a strong learning opportunity for someone who wants to build a serious foundation in product and experience design.

What You’ll Do

UI/UX & Product Design Support


Support the design of digital products, platforms, websites, and user-facing experiences across U.Labs projects and internal products
Assist in building user flows, wireframes, low-fidelity concepts, and high-fidelity UI designs
Help translate business requirements and ideas into clear and intuitive interface solutions
Work on layouts, screens, components, and interaction patterns for digital products
Build and support landing pages on Framer as part of web and product experience execution
Contribute to improving usability, structure, clarity, and visual consistency across interfaces


Product Thinking & Experience Design


Think through user journeys, product logic, navigation structures, and information hierarchy
Help map user problems into design opportunities and feature-level solutions
Contribute to problem-solving around onboarding, dashboards, forms, checkout flows, product pages, and other key experience touchpoints
Participate in discussions around what makes an interface not just beautiful, but useful and conversion-aware


Design Systems & UI Consistency


Work on reusable components, design systems, and UI patterns
Help organize Figma files, styles, variables, libraries, and component structures
Support the creation and maintenance of visual consistency across screens and flows
Assist in preparing design assets and structured handoff files for development


Collaboration & Execution


Work closely with senior designers and cross-functional teams to iterate on screens and flows
Incorporate feedback quickly and thoughtfully into design iterations
Support design QA by checking implemented screens against final design intent
Use AI tools and platforms within the design workflow for exploration, ideation, refinement, content structuring, faster iteration, and productivity
Contribute to fast-paced project execution while maintaining attention to detail


What You Bring (Required)

Design Foundation


0–1 years of experience through internships, freelance work, academic projects, or personal product design projects
A portfolio that shows UI/UX, product design thinking, wireframes, user flows, or digital interface work
Strong interest in product design, UI systems, and user experience design
Good understanding of layout, spacing, typography, hierarchy, and interface structure
Ability to think through flows and screens from a user-first lens


Tools & Execution


Good working knowledge of Figma
Working familiarity with Framer for building and shipping landing pages
Ability to create wireframes, polished UI screens, clickable prototypes, and simple digital experiences
Strong familiarity with AI tools and platforms that support product design, UI exploration, UX workflows, research synthesis, content generation, faster iteration, and prototyping
Familiarity using tools such as Claude Code, Codex, Replit, and Emergent within modern design and product-building workflows
Ability to meaningfully use AI within the design process to improve speed, thinking, outputs, and productivity — not just for superficial image generation
Basic understanding of design systems, component-based design, and structured file organization
Ability to take feedback well and improve work through iterations
Strong attention to detail in screen design and layout consistency


Mindset & Approach


Curiosity and willingness to learn fast
Ownership mindset — you care about the quality of what you make
Strong observation skills and eye for detail
Ability to balance creativity with usability and clarity
Good communication skills and openness to collaboration
Genuine interest in digital products, interfaces, ecommerce, SaaS, and modern user experiences


Nice to Have


Exposure to product design case studies or real app / web projects
Basic understanding of UX research, heuristic thinking, or usability principles
Familiarity with Framer, Webflow, or prototyping tools beyond Figma
Interest in motion design, micro-interactions, or interaction patterns
Basic understanding of HTML/CSS/frontend implementation constraints
Experience using AI tools within real design workflows is a strong advantage
Interest in ecommerce UX, SaaS interfaces, or conversion-focused design


Why Join U.Labs?

Real Product Exposure: Work on actual digital products, platforms, and user-facing experiences — not just mock assignments.

Strong Learning Environment: Learn directly from experienced designers and cross-functional teams working across product, brand, and technology.

Product-First Thinking: Build a strong foundation in UI/UX, product thinking, and digital systems design.

Fast-Paced Growth: Get exposure to real workflows, real feedback loops, and high-quality execution standards.

Cross-Domain Design Experience: Work across websites, ecommerce, SaaS, internal products, and modern digital experiences.

Opportunity to Build Your Design Muscle: Strengthen your portfolio and practical skill set through meaningful design work.

We care strongly about clarity of thought, attention to detail, design fundamentals, and a genuine desire to grow as a product designer.

Note: This is a paid internship.Skills: ui design,uiux,product design,digital,platforms,saas,interfaces,design

title: MBA Management Trainees(Marketing)_Freshers
description:

Experience: Freshers

Timings: US Night Shift







About the Role:

eJAmerica is seeking bright, motivated graduates from reputed business schools (MBA) to join as Management Trainees. This program offers structured exposure to IT Service Delivery Management, Business Development Management, and Solutions Management. Role allocation post-probation will be based on performance and aptitude.

Key Responsibilities:

Learn and assist in IT service delivery operations, client engagement, and solution planning.
Support business development initiatives, proposals, and presentations.
Prepare and manage reports, dashboards, and project documentation.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet delivery and client objectives.
Use ChatGPT and other AI tools to enhance productivity and quality of work.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

MBA (final-year students or recent graduates)
Excellent communication skills – verbal and written.
Strong multitasking and time-management abilities.
Proficiency in ChatGPT and other AI productivity tools.
Advanced Excel skills (data analysis, pivot tables, dashboards).

Business Development Manager Trainee
Account Manager Trainee

title: Graduate Apprentice Trainee
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.

ROLE & RESPONSIBILITY

This role is designed for fresh graduates stepping into the Construction Equipment industry for the first time. The program aims to provide hands-on experience, product knowledge, and exposure to real-time customer interactions while supporting Volvo CE and dealership business objectives.

Location: Delhi

Key Responsibilities

Support the dealer sales team in day-to-day sales activities and field operations

Assist in monthly sales forecasting and tracking sales leads

Gain detailed product knowledge of Volvo construction equipment

Participate in customer meetings and site visits with senior sales staff

Learn to build customer relationships and handle basic queries

Collect market intelligence on competitors and customer needs

Support execution of local marketing initiatives and promotions

Work with product support teams to understand aftermarket services

Capture learnings and insights from field visits for reporting and training

Skills & Competencies Required

Strong willingness to learn and adapt

Good communication skills (spoken and written)

Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)

Positive attitude with a customer-centric mindset

Willingness to travel and work in field environments

Team player with proactive approach

Basic understanding of construction equipment applications

Educational Qualification

Graduate Degree in:

Engineering (Mechanical / Automobile) OR

Business Management (Marketing / Sales)

Who We Are & What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. This mission creates opportunities across our global network of brands and teams.

By joining Volvo Group, you will work with some of the brightest minds in the industry, contributing to building a better future for society. We believe in teamwork, inclusiveness, and continuous growth.

Volvo Construction Equipment, part of the Volvo Group, is driven by the purpose of building the world we want to live in. Together, we create solutions for a cleaner, smarter, and more connected future.

We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

Who We Are And What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join Volvo Group. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

Part of Volvo Group, Volvo Construction Equipment is a global company driven by our purpose to build the world we want to live in. Together we develop and deliver solutions for a cleaner, smarter, and more connected world. By unleashing everyone’s full potential, we build a more sustainable future for all our stakeholders. Come join our team and help us build a better tomorrow.
